hero_subtitle: The online multiplayer strategy game where cats rule the world
feature_1_desc: Build a mighty empire, forge alliances with other players and conquer enemy tribes
feature_2_desc: Battle live players in real-time from all around the world
feature_3_desc: Immerse yourself in a magical fantasy universe where cats wield mystical powers
step_1_desc: Create your free account and choose a name for your empire
step_2_desc: Develop your village into a city, gather resources and train warriors
step_3_desc: Attack, form alliances and become the most powerful tribe on the server
join_subtitle: Be among the first to enter the world of Magic Cats
